posts.author: CalebGoldberg (Caleb Goldberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

My advertising firm assigns a board for each client we work with. We have quite a few, and as such have dozens of boards. It would be convenient to be able to assign colors or icons to these boards in the board column so that we can more easily navigate and differentiate the boards from each other.
